description: Added exportToCsv async function with hardcoded delimiter
diff_summary: Added exportToCsv that converts data array to CSV and triggers download

edge_cases: data[0] throws if data is empty array; values containing commas or newlines will corrupt the CSV (no quoting/escaping)
ground_truth.broken_pattern: Hardcoded comma delimiter — international users may need semicolon; no handling of special characters in values unlike the careful JSON formatting in exportToJson
ground_truth.next_prompt: CSV export is corrupting rows that contain commas in the data
ground_truth.notes: Common naive CSV generation without proper escaping
